data.title: Stablecoin Trading Volume Declines Amid Market Challenges
data.description: According to PANews, the trading volume of the top ten stablecoins has dropped to a quarter of the levels seen during the bull market cycle last December. Analysts attribute this decline to trader fatigue, regulatory uncertainty, and Bitcoin's supply reaching a seven-year low.

data.title: Hyperliquid Announces Key Risk Management Updates Following JELLY Market Incident
data.description:
Bitget's Gracy Chen recently accused Hyperliquid of mismanagement similar to FTX, while citing decentralization concerns and risky vault structures after its JELLY delisting.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/hyperliquid-announces-key-risk-management-updates-following-jelly-market-incident/

data.title: 125,600 ETH held by two whales are facing liquidation, with liquidation prices of $1,805 and $1,787 respectively
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 125,603 ETH held by two whales are facing liquidation, worth US$238 million, with liquidation prices of US$1,805 and US$1,787 respectively.

data.title: Circle Reports Increase in USDC Circulation Amid Recent Issuances and Redemptions
data.description:
According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle has issued approximately 44 billion USDC and redeemed around 34 billion USDC over the past week ending March 27, 2025. This activity has resulted in an increase of about 10 billion USDC in circulation.

The total circulation of USDC now stands at 602 billion units, supported by reserves amounting to approximately $604 billion. These reserves include around $7 billion in cash and $53.4 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: Cardano Price In Spotlight, What to Expect
data.description:
After noting a brief recovery, Cardano (ADA) price crashed in keeping with the overall market movement. Notably, the coin found a new support level at $0. 73, as a momentary dip below this price was swiftly cleared off. At the same time, Cardano traders have committed over one billion ADA in Open Interest
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/29/cardano-price-in-spotlight-what-to-expect/

data.title: The whale bought 20,654 AAVE with 1,906 ETH 5 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, a whale spent 1906 ETH (about 3.6 million US dollars) to purchase 20654 AAVE 5 hours ago, with an average price of about 175 US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that on March 28, Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a total net outflow of $93.157 million.

The largest single-day net outflow was recorded by the Fidelity Bitcoin ETF (FBTC), which saw a withdrawal of $93.157 million. Despite this, the historical total net inflow for FBTC stands at $11.469 billion.

As of the latest update, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $94.388 billion. The net asset ratio, which compares the market value to Bitcoin's total market capitalization, is 5.68%. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $36.245 billion.

data.title: Sony's Soneium launches Stargate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Stargate officially announced that Sony's Soneium has been integrated into the Stargate platform and joined its Hydra Chain network. It will now support native assets on more than 50 blockchains and Omnichain Fungible Tokens (OFTs) to access Soneium, with liquidity and interoperability.

data.title: Panama releases comprehensive draft of cryptocurrency regulation, recognizing digital assets as legal means of payment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Panama has released a comprehensive draft aimed at regulating cryptocurrencies and promoting the development of blockchain services. The new bill recognizes digital assets as a legal means of payment, allowing both parties to voluntarily use Bitcoin, Ethereum and stablecoins in commercial and civil contracts. The bill establishes a regulatory framework for virtual asset service providers (VASPs), requiring them to register with the Financial Analysis Unit (UAF) and comply with KYC and AML regulations. Those who fail to register will face penalties. In addition, the bill promotes the use of blockchain for public governance, supporting digital identity systems and tokenized securities to improve transparency and efficiency. The draft will enter Congress for discussion in the coming weeks. (CryptoSlate)

data.title: Panama Proposes Comprehensive Legislation for Cryptocurrency Regulation and Blockchain Development
data.description: According to Odaily, Panama has introduced a comprehensive draft aimed at regulating cryptocurrencies and advancing blockchain services. The new legislation recognizes digital assets as legal payment methods, allowing voluntary use of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins in commercial and civil contracts. It establishes a regulatory framework for Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs), requiring them to register with the Financial Analysis Unit (UAF) and comply with KYC and AML regulations, with penalties for non-compliance. Additionally, the bill promotes the use of blockchain in public governance, supporting digital identity systems and tokenized securities to enhance transparency and efficiency. The draft will be discussed in Congress in the coming weeks.
